top3.sql:
SELECT AVG(oxygen_count) 
FROM (
    SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(a.atom_id) AS oxygen_count
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    WHERE a.element = 'O'
    AND m.molecule_id IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT b.molecule_id
        FROM bond b
        WHERE b.bond_type = 'single'
    )
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
) AS oxygen_counts;

SELECT AVG(oxygen_count) 
FROM (
    SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(a.atom_id) AS oxygen_count
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    WHERE a.element = 'O'
    AND m.molecule_id IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT b.molecule_id
        FROM bond b
        WHERE b.bond_type = 'single'
    )
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
) AS oxygen_counts;

SELECT AVG(oxygen_count) 
FROM (
    SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(CASE WHEN a.element = 'O' THEN 1 END) AS oxygen_count
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    WHERE m.molecule_id IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT molecule_id 
        FROM bond 
        WHERE bond_type = 'single'
    )
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
) t
WHERE oxygen_count > 0;

SELECT AVG(oxygen_count)
FROM (
    SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(a.atom_id) AS oxygen_count
    FROM molecule m
    INNER JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    WHERE a.element = 'O'
      AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM bond b
          WHERE b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
            AND b.bond_type = 'single'
      )
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
) AS oxygen_counts;

SELECT AVG(oxygen_count) 
FROM (

    FROM molecule m
    JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    WHERE a.element = 'O'
    AND m.molecule_id IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT b.molecule_id
        FROM bond b
        WHERE b.bond_type = 'single'
    )
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
) AS oxygen_counts;

SELECT AVG(oxygen_count) 
FROM (
    SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(CASE WHEN a.element = 'O' THEN 1 END) AS oxygen_count
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    WHERE m.molecule_id IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT molecule_id 
        FROM bond 
        WHERE bond_type = 'single'
    )
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
) t
WHERE oxygen_count > 0;

SELECT AVG(oxygen_count)
FROM (
    SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(a.atom_id) AS oxygen_count
    FROM molecule m
    INNER JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    WHERE a.element = 'O'
      AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM bond b
          WHERE b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
            AND b.bond_type = 'single'
      )
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
) AS oxygen_counts;

final.sql:
SELECT AVG(oxygen_count) 
FROM (
    SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(a.atom_id) AS oxygen_count
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    WHERE a.element = 'O'
    AND m.molecule_id IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT b.molecule_id
        FROM bond b
        WHERE b.bond_type = 'single'
    )
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
) AS oxygen_counts;
